title: The LaRouche Plan to Create 1.5 Billion Jobs Today Begins 500 Years in the Future -- Class 6
description: This is the last class in this series. We'll be exploring tonight exactly how we can implement the LaRouche Plan to create 1.5 Billion new productive jobs, build the World Land-Bridge, and ultimately our develop planets other than our current one. The class intends to pull together the concepts we discussed in previous classes: the value of classical culture versus the destructive effect of today's popular culture; the great blessing of debt to an economy; the superiority of the American system of political economy over the evil British imperial system; using LaRouche's concept of potential relative population density (PRPD) to determine the success or failure of an economy.

chapters.title: How do we face the crisis
